title: You Can't Have Everything
writer: Harry Tugend, Jack Yellen, Karl Tunberg
actors: Alice Faye, The Ritz Brothers, Don Ameche
plot: Starving playwright Judith Wells meets playboy writer of musicals George Macrae over a plate of stolen spaghetti. He persuades producer Sam Gordon to buy her ridiculous play "North Winds" just to improve his romantic chances, and ...
